summary: UI Developer with 4 years of hands-on experience building scalable, high-performance web applications across HealthCare, Casino Gaming, and B2B Marketing Automation domains. Proven expertise in Angular, React, TypeScript, and RxJS  delivering enterprise-grade solutions with modular architecture, RBAC, REST API integration, and responsive design. Adept at collaborating in Agile teams, mentoring junior developers, and consistently optimizing application performance across complex, cross-domain projects.

experience.title: UI Developer
experience.description: Developed MassEngage Lead Accelerator B2B marketing automation platform
bullets: Led frontend transformation of a scalable B2B SaaS lead generation platform using Angular 13 with feature-based modular architecture, lazy-loaded feature modules, and reusable UI components
Engineered a dynamic campaign workflow builder with drag-and-drop graphical visualization, conditional branching, and automated lead scoring rule engine
Implemented Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) with Angular route guards, CanActivate/CanLoad guards, custom permission directives, and role-driven UI element visibility
Built automated lead lifecycle engine: real-time assignment logic, email notifications with Excel attachment reports, and intelligent redistribution for rejected or uncontacted leads
Developed configurable lead export (XLSX/PDF) and analytics dashboards displaying funnel metrics, conversion rates, agent performance, and campaign ROI trends
Architected reusable component library (smart tables, reactive forms, stepper modals, chart widgets) using Angular Material, reducing feature development time across modules
Applied RxJS operators (switchMap, debounceTime, combineLatest, takeUntil) for efficient async streams, eliminating race conditions and memory leaks
Optimized bundle output via AOT compilation, tree shaking, and Webpack bundle analysis  reducing initial load time by ~30%

experience.title: Software Developer
experience.description: Developed Healthcare Trial Accelerator Platform for streamlining clinical trial lifecycle management
bullets: Led Angular 14 frontend development for a multi-module clinical trial SaaS platform, establishing feature-based architecture with shared libraries and clean module boundaries
Designed and built 30+ reusable Angular components (data tables, multi-step wizards, dynamic forms, patient cards, timeline trackers) and injectable shared services for cross-module use
Collaborated closely with product owners and backend teams to define API contracts, data models, and integration workflows for 20+ RESTful endpoints
Implemented NgRx store with typed actions, reducers, selectors, and effects for centralized state management; applied OnPush change detection and lazy loading to optimize performance
Enforced granular RBAC (Admin, Investigator, Monitor, Coordinator) via route guards and structural directives; integrated JWT-based auth with auto token refresh via HTTP interceptors
Implemented audit trail logging on all data mutations to meet 21 CFR Part 11 and HIPAA electronic records compliance requirements
Worked with QA and DevOps teams on CI/CD pipeline setup (Azure DevOps), test automation with Jasmine/Karma, and streamlined deployment and bug tracking via Jira

experience.title: Sr. Software Developer
experience.description: Developed dynamic and engaging online slot games for a global casino gaming platform (MG Asia)
bullets: Developed immersive slot game UIs using PixiJS WebGL renderer and HTML5 Canvas API, achieving consistent 60fps gameplay across desktop, tablet, and mobile browsers
Engineered fluid reel spin animations with custom easing curves, motion blur during spin, landing bounce physics, and win-line highlight sequences using PixiJS ticker and tweening library
Implemented configurable payline engines supporting 5, 10, 20, and 243-ways configurations with dynamic win calculation and visual payline overlay rendering
Built 3-reel and 5-reel game mechanics including wild substitutions, scatter detection, free spin triggers, multiplier stacking, and cascading reel (avalanche) mechanics
Designed and integrated a progressive jackpot meter with real-time WebSocket-based increment feeds and milestone-triggered jackpot win celebration animations
Engineered bonus round mini-games (pick-a-prize, wheel spin, free spins mode) driven by a finite state machine for predictable, testable game state transitions
Built a real-time leaderboard system and tiered player rewards module with achievement badges, XP level tracking, and loyalty milestone notifications
Optimized asset pipeline using texture atlases, compressed sprite sheets, and progressive lazy loading  reducing initial game load time by ~35%

experience.title: UI Developer
experience.description: Developed MSettu and Nahikalii platforms for Mahindra & Mahindra managing various business processes
bullets: Architected MSettu using Angular 16 standalone components to streamline Mahindra's financial workflows, supply chain operations, and dealer performance reporting pipelines
Implemented role-segregated dashboards (Finance, Operations, Admin) with configurable widget layouts and permission-controlled data visibility per user role
Built Nahikalii as a fully responsive React.js application using SASS modules for scoped styling and React hooks (useState, useEffect, useContext, useReducer) for state management
Integrated PixiJS canvas scenes and D3.js chart types (bar, line, donut, heatmap) to render real-time operational KPIs and business intelligence metrics interactively
Connected 10+ REST APIs using Axios with request interceptors for token auth, deduplication, and standardized error boundary handling across both platforms
Optimized React performance via React.memo, useMemo, useCallback memoization, react-window virtualized lists, and lazy-loaded route-based code splitting
Delivered both platforms within a 3-month Agile engagement using bi-weekly sprints, Jira task tracking, and GitLab merge request workflows with mandatory code review gates

experience.title: SME
experience.description: Developed a comprehensive Digital Learning platform for enhanced user experiences
bullets: Contributed as SME and frontend developer to a full-scale LMS platform serving 5000+ learners across academic and professional corporate training segments
Integrated multi-modal content delivery: HLS video streaming with playback controls, interactive quizzes, graded assignments, downloadable e-books, and live session scheduling with calendar sync
Designed a personalized learning path recommendation engine suggesting courses and resources based on user role, skill gap analysis, progress history, and behavioral engagement signals
Built a module-level and course-level assessment engine supporting MCQ, fill-in-the-blank, and descriptive formats with configurable time limits, attempt restrictions, and automated scoring
Created instructor and learner dashboards with real-time progress rings, streak indicators, XP-based gamification, completion certificate generation, and deadline alerts
Integrated a data analytics pipeline tracking video watch duration, quiz scores, module completion rates, and session frequency  surfaced in instructor reporting dashboards
Collaborated with subject matter experts to digitize and structure course content into intuitive LMS modules with consistent UX patterns and accessibility compliance

strengths.title: Team Collaboration
strengths.description: Capable of quick learning and delivering effective solutions in a team setting, with daily stand-ups, peer reviews, and cross-functional Agile collaboration

strengths.title: Problem Solving
strengths.description: Strong analytical approach to breaking down complex UI challenges  from RNG-based game mechanics to HIPAA-compliant healthcare workflows

strengths.title: Adaptability
strengths.description: Quickly ramped up across diverse domains  healthcare, casino gaming, e-learning, e-publishing, and B2B marketing  adopting new tech stacks with each project

strengths.title: Mentoring & Leadership
strengths.description: Conducted code reviews, mentored junior developers, and ensured adherence to coding standards across multiple teams

strengths.title: Performance Optimisation
strengths.description: Applied lazy loading, RxJS Observables, modular architecture, and efficient API state handling to build fast, scalable Angular applications

bullets: Developed user-friendly slot game UIs optimized for cross-platform play across desktop, tablet, and mobile devices

Implemented multiple payline configurations, 3-reel/5-reel mechanics, wilds, scatters, free spins, and multipliers
